content.en:
"If you want to raise the Ultimate Will to the ninth transformation and break through to the Ultimate Will, I'm afraid you can't do it here, the help is not very great, it will take an infinite long time, and it will be a bit of a waste of time to continue to cultivate here. "

Ye Tian decided to break through the level and go to the fourth floor of the Ultimate Tower.

Maybe you'll enter the fourth floor with even better rewards!

So, Ye Tian went to break through to the fourth layer, and at this time, there was still no ancient level Ultimate Realm Lord who had entered the third layer, so it can be seen that it was extremely difficult to enter the third layer~

Airplanes!

Ye Tian entered a final-extreme void.

......

"There's nothing here!"

Ye Tian was very puzzled.

There was nothingness, nothing, not even the slightest hint of the Ultimate Rule.

He unleashed an attack, only to find that any force that attacked would become invisible, and even the power of the ultimate rule would be disintegrated here.

However, he soon found the clue.

"After the ultimate rule is dismantled, the simplest ultimate rule particles are formed, which is the most original embodiment of the ultimate rule. "

Lin Tian kept urging the ultimate rule and observing the scattered traces.

All kinds of ultimate rules were scattered, and all kinds of ultimate rule particles were dissected and understood by him, and he gradually realized the usefulness here.

"The Ultimate Masters are really powerful, they have created this Ultimate Void, which can decompose the Ultimate Rules, so that we can comprehend the essence of the Ultimate Rules, and the purpose should be to create our own Ultimate Rules!"

Lin Tianming enlightened.

Why did you think of creating your own ultimate rules, because when he was in the ultimate place, he also obtained some information, such as the information of the impact of the ultimate supreme, there is a rumor, that is, if you want to become the ultimate supreme, you can't use any of the existing ultimate ways, but you have to create your own ultimate way.

Now, there is no breath and power of the Ultimate Dao here, and even the power of the Ultimate Dao will disintegrate into the most primitive Ultimate Rule particles.

It's so good for creating your own ultimate way.

Of course, it's never that easy to create your own ultimate way, and here you might be able to give a little inspiration, such as creating a little prototype.

Perhaps creating a little prototype is the purpose of this assessment.

So, in the following years, Ye Tian continued to try to create his own ultimate way here.

Of course, he first had to dissect the ultimate ways that he had comprehended.

The Ultimate Way of Hell!

The ultimate way to the polar day!

The Darkest Ultimate Way!

......

One ultimate way was dissected and comprehended by him, and his true mystery was comprehended.

After a long time.

Ye Tiancai really began to create his own ultimate way, and he wanted to learn from the points of other ultimate ways to create his own ultimate way.

Any ultimate path has a reference, for example, the ultimate path of the polar sun uses the land of the polar sun as a reference, and the ultimate path of the demon hell uses the ultimate demon hell as a reference object, and the ultimate path there is comprehended.

And what is his reference, and what should be the ultimate way?

Ye Tian has been thinking about this problem for a long time, if he doesn't even think about this step, it will be difficult to create his own ultimate way.

......

"Doomsday Extreme Venerable, this Ten Thousand Laws Supreme Venerable seems to be crooked, this level of assessment only requires that he can pass by fusing the ultimate way, but he wants to try to create his own prototype of the ultimate way, which is more than a hundred times more difficult. Does he think he has any hope of creating it?" asked Shadow Sands Extreme Venerable.

"It's a little difficult!" said Doomsday Venerable, "It's too difficult to realize your ultimate path without other help!"

"Maybe the other Immortal-level Ultimate Realm Masters have all entered the fourth and fifth layers, and he is still lingering here. Shadow Sand Jizun said with a smile.

"Maybe one day he will come to his senses, and he knows that he can't realize it now, so he will change his mind and fuse the ultimate path to enter the fourth layer!" said Doomsday Extreme Venerable.

It can be seen that whether it is the Doomsday Extreme Venerable or the Shadow Sand Extreme Venerable, they have little confidence in Ye Tian's comprehension of his own ultimate way.

......

Time passes.

Countless years of the Ultimate Era have passed.

In such a long time, the outside world has also undergone tremendous changes.

Terran.

Today's human race has far surpassed the past, the number of Ultimate Realm Masters is also increasing, and Ye Xingchen's strength is gradually at the top of the first grade, but if you want to become an ancient level Ultimate Realm Lord, you can't do it here, and even if you want to become a Giant-level Ultimate Realm Lord, it is extremely difficult.

"Father, when are you coming back?"

Ye Xingchen said with some thoughts.

In the past endless and long years, many wars have broken out in the dimensional sea, and the multidimensional territory has been affected, but fortunately, the human race has carried it over again and again.

Without Ye Tian's help, Ye Xingchen also became independent, and alone led the Terran to occupy a dominant position in this war, obtained a lot of resources and territory, and made the Terran continue to grow.

And as the infinite years passed, in the Ultimate Tower, there were Eternal Ultimate Realm Lords who came to the third layer one after another, and they also began to experience the same Ultimate Void as Ye Tian, but they didn't think about creating their own Ultimate Dao, they knew that they couldn't do it, and soon began to fuse the Ultimate Dao.

Only Ye Tian has been trying to create his own ultimate way.

Maybe he had already discovered that the real assessment might not be this, but he was still ready to try it.

Perhaps, he tried it out, and that was the real big chance, even if he entered the fourth layer at night, it didn't matter.

Billions of years have passed.

At this time, there were already Immortal-level Ultimate Realm Masters who had passed the assessment and entered the fourth layer, while Ye Tian was still in the assessment from the third layer to the fourth layer.

Ye Tian was not in a hurry or impatient, but his mood was getting better and better, because he saw the hope of creating his own ultimate way.
